title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Scripbox

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Scripbox
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
